title.en: After coming here, Ye Tian knew what the opport...

content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian came to the Dead River Heavenly Tower through the Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Here, Ye Tian met a ninefold ancestor of the Dead River Heavenly Tower, the Arhat Dao Ancestor.

Luohan Dao Ancestor is one of the Nine Ancestors of the Nine Folds Building, and his cultivation has reached the realm of the late stage of the Nine Ancestors of the Nine Ancestors, and his strength is extremely strong, far from being comparable to the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

After coming here, Ye Tian knew what the opportunity was this time.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, from today onwards, you can enter the Ninefold Realm of the Ninefold Building, if you want to raise from the life level to 9.9, you can't do it with external forces alone, you will know when you go to the Ninefold Realm!"

Luohan Daozu said.

Ye Tian was a little confused, but he still entered the Nine Realms.

At the beginning, Ye Tian didn't know what the Nine Realms were, but after entering, he knew it!

......

"It's a world of its own, and it's completely shielded from all perception from the outside world!"

Ye Tian found that his perceptions with the other replicating bodies had become extremely blurry, and it would take a long time to get in touch.

And here, Ye Tian also saw thirteen half-step sevenfold ancestors.

Among them, there were also two half-step sevenfold ancestors who had been competing for the true blood power of the Black Abyss Giant Beast - Xuanqin Dao Ancestor and Jin Xuan Dao Ancestor.

Previously, Ye Tian had also seen these two in the mountain.

Now it seems that the life level of these two has also reached 9.8.

Subsequently, Ye Tian chatted with these half-step sevenfold ancestors, and only then did he know that Xuanqin Dao Ancestor and Jin Xuan Dao Ancestor had just raised their life level to 9.8, and they entered here a little earlier than Ye Tian.

However, their understanding of the Nine Realms was far beyond Ye Tian's.

After all, their elders were the Ninefold Ancestors.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, the Nine Realms are actually prisons, imprisoning special primordial artifacts one by one. Xuanqin Dao Ancestor introduced: "These special primordial antiquities are all half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor realms, and they contain the breath of life, and the life level has reached a level comparable to our 9.9. It can be said that these primordial antiquities are the most perfect life forms. At present, cultivators who want to raise their life level to 9.9 cannot rely on external objects. Otherwise, with the foundation of the Nine-Fold Building, it should be possible to give us countless treasures that can quickly improve the life level, and to pile up a batch of half-step sevenfold ancestors with a life level of 9.9. But in reality, it has not been done so far. "

"Then how do we raise the life level to 9.9?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

"Endless Dao Ancestor come with me!"

Xuanqin Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian to a place in the Nine Realms, where a special primordial artifact was sealed, which resembled a snake in appearance, and released purple thunder and lightning all over its body.

This is a primordial artifact similar to a snake, with a life level comparable to a half-step sevenfold ancestor of 9.9.

And right around here, stands a stone monument.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, through this stone tablet, you can use your will to enter the body of this primordial artifact and comprehend its breath of life. And there is also a inheritance on it, which introduces the secret of how to raise the life level to 9.9. But once you accept the inheritance, you can't say it, and you can't say it. So, I can't tell you about it. "

Xuanqin Daozu said.

Ye Tian understood, and immediately leaned into the stone tablet, and soon understood.

"Reaching the 9.8 life level is the limit of the practitioner, and the boundary must be broken in order to achieve the 9.9 life level. And if you want to raise the life level to 9.9, the easiest way at the moment is to comprehend the life breath of these primordial antiquities, so as to create a technique, and use this technique to transform yourself and cross the boundary!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And this technique is only suitable for oneself, not for others, because every half-step sevenfold ancestor who has reached a life level of 9.8 will be arranged by the nine-story building to enter here, so as to comprehend these primordial artifacts whose life level is comparable to 9.9.

In these years of enlightenment, the Nine-Story Building will also provide many resources to assist in enlightenment, and every other year, it will even provide a drop of perfect Dao blood.

The so-called Perfect Dao Blood is the Dao Ancestor who raised the life level to 9.9 in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, and a drop of Perfect Dao Blood came from them.

Through the Perfect Dao Blood, you will also have some understanding of the life level of 9.9.

However, even so, it is still unimaginably difficult to create a technique that raises the life level to 9.9!

For example, a half-step sevenfold ancestor of the Nine Realms, the Qingshu Dao Ancestor, has been in the Nine Realms for three hundred billion Origin Realm eras, and there is still no hope.

The one who has been here for a longer time has been here for the 900 million Yuan Domain Era, and he still hasn't broken through, and he's a little crazy.

Maybe in a few more years, he will give up and leave the Nine Realms.

Once you leave the Nine Realms, you will be deemed to have given up, and you will no longer be qualified to enter here.

Soon, Ye Tian took a look at all the primordial artifacts of the Ninefold Realm, there were a total of sixteen primordial artifacts here, all of which were different, and each primordial artifact was blessed by the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor with various means of sealing to ensure that these primordial artifacts could not escape from here.

Ye Tian first relied on his own comprehension for a period of time, and then communicated with other half-step sevenfold ancestors, and occasionally listened to the sermons of one ninefold ancestor after another.

However, he still found nothing.

"It's so hard!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If you don't rely on other means, even if you have been here for an infinite number of years, it will be difficult to create such a technique!

"It's no wonder that for a long time, there haven't been many half-step sevenfold ancestors in the Nine-Fold Building who have raised their life level to 9.9, this is simply too difficult!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he plans to make another plan, which is to duplicate these original antiquities!

Of course.

There was a horror in copying the original antiquity, so he never dared to do it.

But now, he knew why there was such a feeling of great terror, because from the Nine Stories Building, he knew that all the primordial antiquities were under the control of one place.

That place is called the Primordial Ancient Sea!

The terrifying beings of the Primordial Ancient Sea controlled an infinite number of Primordial Artifacts, and killing the Primordial Artifacts would not attract the attention of those terrifying beings.

But if you try to capture and study the original antiquities, you will attract the attention of those terrifying beings.

For example, the capture of the Primordial Antiquity Sacred Dao Monument would cause the wrath of such a terrifying existence, so without the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor resisting that terrifying existence, it would be impossible to successfully capture it at all.

And the same is true of the Primordial Antiquities of the Nine Realms, if the Nine Realms are shielded, so that the terrifying existence of those Primordial Ancient Seas cannot be perceived, this place will not be so safe.

"If I want to copy these primordial artifacts, I must block the perception of the terrifying existence of the primordial artifacts, otherwise once I try to copy them, I will definitely attract their attention, then I will be finished!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And after his inquiry, the Nine-Story Building really has a treasure that shields the terrifying existence of the original antiquities, and it can be exchanged for points.
